title: Yesu ye Anjagala
first_line: Yesu ye anjagala, bwatyo bwe yayogera;

verses.lines:
Yesu ye anjagala, bwatyo bwe yayogera;
Abaan(a) abato nga babe, beyawa omukisa gwe.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Anjagala nze, anjagala nze;
Anjagala nze, yayogera bw'atyo.

Yesu ye anjagala, bwe mbeer(a) omunak(u) ennyo;
Era alingabira, byonna bye nnetaaga nze.

Yesu fenn(a) atwagala, yaf(a) okutununula;
Yaggulawo oluggi, atusonyiw(e) ebibi.

Yesu ankulembera, gyennagendanga yonna;
Tandekeng(a) alintuusa, mu ggulu nga njaguza.

title: Enkya Nanaabye Engalo
first_line: Enkya nanaaby(e) engalo, ne nzitukuza nnyo;

verses.lines:
Enkya nanaaby(e) engalo, ne nzitukuza nnyo;
N'enziwaay(o) eri Yesu, okumukolera.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ggwe (e)bigere byange, wegendereze;
Ebya Yesu byokka, by'onkozesanga.

Era n'amatu gange, gawulire byonna;
Buli ebisaanira, ndyoke mbikolenga.

Era n'amaaso gange, galab(e) amazima;
Netaag(a) okugafuga, okumuweereza.

N'olulimi njagal(a) okuluwa Mukama;
Okwoger(a) ebituufu, ebikusanyusa.

Naatunuuliranga Ye, mu buli kye nkola;
Mpone ebibi byonna, mu linnya lya Yesu.

title: Yesu Alaba Ennyonyi
english_title: God Sees the Little Sparrow Fall
first_line: Yesu alaba ennyonyi nga zigwa ku ttaka,

verses.lines:
Yesu alaba ennyonyi nga zigwa ku ttaka,
Oba ng(a) azaagala bwatyo, Nange anjagala.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Anjagala, anjagala, mmanyi nga'njagala;
Obang(a) ayagal(a) ennyonyi, nange anjagala.

Ayambaza amalanga, erang(i) ennung(i) ennyo,
Nga bwayagal(a) ebimuli, Nange anjagala.

Ebitono ne'binene, byonna yabitonda
Anajjukirang(a) babe, anaabaagalanga.

Ensimbi ezigwa oziwulira?
Zigwa mu nsawo, tuziwa Yesu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ensimbi zigwa mu nsawo, wulira zigwa,
Tuziwa Mukama, atwale zonna.

Bulijjo tumuwe, fenna abato;
Kano ke kalabo, kaffe abato.

Yesu ffe abaana, tuleese buno;
Naye nga tukuze, tulisinzaawo.

Tulina buno, tukwagala nnyo;
Ye saddaaka yaffe, olw'ekisa kyo.

Omutambuze nze, omugeny(i) era;
Eby'omusi bingi, bijj(a) okunnumba.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yesu Atwal(a) abato, alibakulembera,
N'abatuusa ewuwe, mu maka ge Ye.

Ensi eyo nnungi, temuli kabi;
N'ennaku temuli, tebituukayo.

Olugendo olwo, alutambula;
Asab(a) eri Yesu, obutalemwa.

Yesu onnongoose, onjigirize;
Onnun'gamye nkwate, erijja gy'oli.

title: Awo Yesu Bwe Yatambula
first_line: Awo Yesu bwe yatambula, edda mu nsi entukuvu;

verses.lines:
Awo Yesu bwe yatambula, edda mu nsi entukuvu;
(A)bakyala Abayudaaya, baamusemberera.

Bajja nga bamuleetera, abaana baabwe abato;
(A)bateeke mu mikono gye, baweebw(e) omukisa.

Naye abayigirizwa, ne babagobera ddala;
Nti temumuteganya nnyo, tubeegayiridde.

Bwe yabalaba abato, Yesu yalagira bajje;
Yayogera n'eggonjebwa, "(A)bato bajje gyendi"

title: Yesu Mulokozi Wange
first_line: Yesu Mulokozi wange; leero nze wuwo wekka,

verses.lines:
Yesu Mulokozi wange; leero nze wuwo wekka,
Omusaayi gwo gunnaazizza, Yesu Mwana gw'endiga.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Tukutendereza Yesu, Yesu Mwana gw'endiga,
Omusaayi gwo gunnaazizza, nkwebaz(a) Omulokozi.

Edda nafuba bufubi, okufun(a) emirembe,
Leero mmaliridde ddala, okweyabiza Yesu.

Nnaabuliraang(a) abantu, obulokozi bwonna;
Obutali bwa kitundu, obulamb(a) obw'obuwa.

Nnaategeezang(a) ebya Yesu, n'obuvumu ne sitya;
Eyanzija mu busibe, n'okuwony(a) eyamponya.

Nneebaz(a) eyanunula nze, eyamponya wakisa!
Yes(u) ankuum(a) ansanyus(a) era, bulijjo, Yebazibwe.

title: Yesu Bwabeera mu Maka
first_line: Yesu bw'abeera mu maka, gaba ga ssanyu,

verses.lines:
Yesu bw'abeera mu maka, gaba ga ssanyu,
Gaba ga ssanyu, ssanyu lingi nnyo;
Yesu bw'abeera mu maka, gaba ga ssanyu,
Ssanyu lingi nnyo.

Yesu bw'abeera ne taata, aba wa ssanyu,
Aba wa ssanyu, ssanyu lingi nnyo;
Yesu bw'abeera ne taata, aba wa ssanyu,
Ssanyu lingi nnyo.

Yesu bw'abeera ne maama, aba wa ssanyu,
Aba wa ssanyu, ssanyu lingi nnyo;
Yesu bwabeera ne maama, aba wa ssanyu,
Ssanyu lingi nnyo.

Bw'abeera mu mutima gwo, guba gwa ssanyu,
Guba gwa ssanyu, ssanyu lingi nnyo;
Bw'abeera mu mutima gwo, guba gwa ssanyu,
Ssanyu lingi nnyo.

title: Ensimbi Zaffe Mugende
first_line: Ensimbi zaffe mugende, mutwaal(e) obubaka bwonna;

verses.lines:
Ensimbi zaffe mugende, mutwaal(e) obubaka bwonna;
Eri abaana abato, nabo balokoke.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Ensimbi zaffe mugende, mugende mu baabuulire;
Yesu Mukama wa kisa, wagazi w'abantu.

Mugende mubabuulire, byonna bye tukola wano;
Nabo balyoke bayige, nga ffe bwetuyiga.

Newankubadde nga ntono, Mukama zimusanyusa;
Okukol(a) omulimu gwe, zibuulir(e) abaana.

Ndikuba ennanga yange mu ggulu,
Yange mu ggulu, yange mu ggulu,
Ndikuba ennanga yange mu ggulu,
Walibaawo (e)ssanyu, (e)ssanyu.

Ndyambala busuuti yange muggulu,
Yange mu ggulu, yange mu ggulu;
Ndyamabala busuuti yange muggulu,
Walibaawo (e)ssanyu, (e)ssanyu.

Waggulu mu bbanga, ennyonyi zibuuka,
Neziwummulira wansi mu bisu;
Ekiwawa kya kkono, n'ekiwawa ekya ddyo,
Leka ennyonyi zeebake ekiro.

Enjuba evaayo, (o)musana guyaka,
Otyanno wanjuba, enyony(i) zibuuza;
(E)bimuli birungi, (e)miti gisanyusa,
Twebaza Kitaffe olw'obutonzi!

title: Mu Mutima, Mu Mutima
first_line: Mu mutima, mu mutima, jjangu mu mutima gwange;

verses.lines:
Mu mutima, mu mutima, jjangu mu mutima gwange;
Jjangu leero, oyingire, jangu mu mutima gwange.

Omusana, omusana, gwake mu mutima gwange;
Yesu Musana gw'obulamu, gwake mu mutima gwange.

title: Katonda Tukwebaza
english_title: Thank You for the World so Sweet

verses.lines:
Katonda tukwebaza, olw'emmere gyetulya;
N'engoye zetwambala, n'olw'ennyony(i) eziyimba.

Tukwebaz(a) olw'amaka, era n'olwoomusana;
N'olw'eggul(o) olulungi, n'olwabyonna by'otuwa.

title: Sabanga Mpola Mu Makya
english_title: Whisper a Prayer in the Morning
first_line: Sabanga mpola mu makya, sabanga n'eggulo

verses.lines:
Sabanga mpola mu makya, sabanga n'eggulo
Sabanga nakawungeezi, kiyamba omutima.

Yesu addam(u) okusaba, olunaku lwonna;
Yesu addam(u) okusaba, okutusanyusa.

Ayinza okujja ku nkya, oba olw'eggulo;
Oba anajja mu ttumbi, gumanga omwoyo.

title: Ffe Tuli Ggye kya Mukama
first_line: Ffe tuli ggye lya Mukama, ff(e) abatono abanafu;

verses.lines:
Ffe tuli ggye lya Mukama, ff(e) abatono abanafu;
Kyokka ffe twagala Yesu, tumukolere bingi.

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Waliwo abato bangi, ewala mu bizinga;
Tebannamanya ku Yesu, basinza bifaananyi.

Tutumey(o) abasomesa, bayig(e) okusabanga;
Mukama omulokozi, asonyiwa ebibi.

Yesu yajja ku nsi kuno, okufa ku lwa bonna;
Bwe balimutegeera Ye, alibawa essanyu.

(E)kimuli ekito mbuulira, Katonda akukolera ki?
"Ampa enkuba n'omusana gwe, kye nava nkula bwe nti."

(A)kanyonyi akato mbuulira, Katonda akukolera ki?
"Ampa emmere n'aw'okusula, kye nva mmuyimbir(a) ennyo."

(O)bwana mmwe obuto mwogere, Katonda abakolera ki?
"Bulijjo atuwa essanyu lye, kye tuva tusek(a) ennyo."

title: Buli Nnaku Omukaaga
first_line: Buli nnaku omukaaga, tukol(a) era tuzannya;

verses.lines:
Buli nnaku omukaaga, tukol(a) era tuzannya;
Olw'omusanvu lwa Yesu, (o)lunaku lutukuvu.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Emu, bbiri, satu, nnya, ttaano, omukaaga zaffe;
Nay(e) olw'omusanvu lulwe, Sabbiiti ya Mukama.

Bye tunaayogera leero, ne byonna bye tukola;
Ka tumugoberere nga, abaana ba Katonda.

Ka tugende mu ssomero, lya Ssabiiti tusabe
Era tuyige ku Yesu, n'okwagala kw(e) okungi.

title: Ndibafuula Abavubi B'abantu
english_title: I Will Make You Fishers of Men

verses.lines:
Ndibafuula abavubi, abavubi ab'abantu;
Ndibafuula abavubi, mmwe mujje gyendi.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mmwe mujje gyendi, muyite nange;
Ndibafuula abavubi, mmwe mujje gyendi.

Wulira Yesu ayita, jjangu gy'endi, jjangu gy'endi
Wulira Yesu ayita, akuwummuze.

Yesu Kristo ajja kudda, Ajja mangu, Ajja mangu;
Yesu Kristo Ajja mangu, okututwala.

(A)baana ba Katonda mmwenna, muwulire bw'atulagira;
Agamba, "Beera mu ssanyu," Kabaka atwagala.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Mu mutima tulin(a) essanyu, tugoberer(a) omulokozi;
Atuweerez(a) essanyu lingi, bulijj(o) atusanyusa.

Tukulemberwa Katonda, mu lugendo atukuuma nnyo;
Atusuubiz(a) omukisa, tayinza kutuleka.

Abato be n'abakulu, katubeere n'obunyiikivu;
Tetukoowa amang(u) ago, mu kulokol(a) abantu.

Buli lwe tuggwam(u) amaanyi, ekibi kituteganya nnyo;
Ettima ery'omulabe, limalawo essanyu.

Omusana gwaange, nze nnaaguyasanga;
Omusana gwaange, nze nnaaguyasanga; Gwakenga x3

Siguvuniikirenga, nze nnaaguyasanga,
Siguvuniikirenga, nze nnaaguyasanga; Gwakenga x3

Setaani tayinze, nze nnaaguyasanga,
Setaani tayinze, nze nnaaguyasanga; Gwakenga x3

Yesu ajja kujjja, nze nnaaguyasanga,
Yesu ajja kujjja, nze nnaaguyasanga; Gwakenga x3

Baliranwa bange, nze nnaaguyasanga,
Baliranwa bange, nze nnaaguyasanga; Gwakenga x3

(E)miti gyewuuba wuuba, mpola, mpola;
(E)miti gyewuuba mpola, Katonda kwagala.

(E)biwojjolo bibuuka, mpola, mpola;
(E)biwojjola bibuuka, Katonda kwagala.

Nnyonyi zibuuka buuka, mpola, mpola;
Nyonyi zibuuka mpola, Katonda kwagala.

Ebimuli byewuuba, mpola, mpola;
Ebimuli nyewuuba, Katonda kwagala.

Naffe twewuuba wuuba, mpola, mpola;
Naffe ywewuuba mpola, Katonda kwagala.

title: Nze Ndi Mmunyenye Entono
english_title: I'm a Little Star for Jesus
first_line: Nze ndi mmunyenye entono, eyak(a) ekiro kyonna;

verses.lines:
Nze ndi mmunyenye entono, eyak(a) ekiro kyonna;
Nze ndi mmunyenye ya Yesu. Eyaka omusana.

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Nze ndi mmunyeny(e) entono ey'essanyu;
(Nze ndi mmunyenye ya Yesu.) x2

Nze nsi mmunyenye ya Yesu, eyak(a) etezikira;
Nze ndi mmunyenye ya Yesu, nja kwakanga bulijjo.

Nze ndi mmunyenye ya Yesu, mu nsi en(o) eyekibi;
Nja kwakanga kulwa Yesu, okutuusa lw'alijja.

title: Yesu Ayagala Abaana
first_line: Yesu ayagala (a)baana, abaana bonna mu nsi;

verses.label: Chorus

verses.lines:
Tumusinze Katonda Kitaffe, mwagazi, mwagazi;
Abaana be tumutendereze, Katonda, kwagala.

Mwe abaan(a) abato n'abakulu, mwagazi, mwagazi;
Ka twagalenga Mukama waffe; Katonda kwagala.

Bulijjo ka tumuweerezenga, mwagazi, mwagazi;
Bulijjo ka tube bawombeefu; Katonda kwagala.

title: Katonda ye Yantonda
first_line: Enkya ennungi egamba, "Katonda yankola bulungi nnyo!"

verses.lines:
Enkya ennungi egamba, "Katonda yankola bulungi nnyo!"
Enkya ennungi egamba, "Yantonda (ku) lwa kusooka."

Ebire byonna bigamba, "yankola bulungi nnyo!"
Ebire byonna bigamba, "Yantonda (ku) lwa kubiri"

(E)bimuli byonn(a) ebirungi bigamba "Yankola bulungi nnyo!"
(E)bimuli byonna bigamba, "Yankola (ku) lwa kusatu"

Mmunyeny(e) ezimasaamasa zigamba, "yatukola bulungi nnyo!"
Mmunyenye zonna zigamba, "Yantonda (ku) lwa kuna"

Nnyabo wankoko agamba "Katonda yankola bulungi nnyo!"
Nnyabo wankoko agamba "Yantonda ku lwa kutaano"

Omusajja n'omukazi bagamba, "yatukola bulungi nnyo!"
Mu kifaananyi kya Katonda ddala, "Ku lwa mukaaga"

Olunaku lwa Sabbiiti lugamba, "yantonda bulungi nnyo!"
Omukisa n'ekitiibwa yabimpa, "Ku lwa musanvu"

title: Mpa Amafuta mu Tabaaza Yange
english_title: Give Me Oil in My Lamp

verses.label: Chorus
verses.lines:
Yimb(a) ozaana, yimb(a) ozaana,
Yimb(a) ozaana Katonda afuga. x2

Tukwebaza Yesu, olw'okwagala;
N'emikisa emingi gy'otuwa ffe.

Okutukuuma n'okutwambaza;
N'obulamu ne tuzannya n'essanyu.

Mu maka gaffe, n'abatuzaala;
Byetwagala tukwabaze ggwe Yesu.

Ebitundu by'ekkumi bireetebwe,
Munkeme naby(o) olwa leero;
Nnaabafukira emikisa,
Newatabaawo na bbanga, kugyaawo.
